nature_language:
We are 3 people traveling from Chongqing to Nanjing for 3 days. The plan must satisfy at least one of the following:
1. Do not want to try these restaurants: Nanjing Eastern Suburbs State Guesthouse · Crystal Seafood Buffet Restaurant and Tao's Authentic Dezhou Braised Chicken (Kexiang Branch)
2. Accommodation should be within 12.49 km of Linggu Scenic Area
